steps.name: Verify that home page is visible successfully
Click locator('.product-image-wrapper').filter({ hasText: 'Pure Cotton Neon Green Tshirt' }).locator('.productinfo .add-to-cart')
Verify that cart page is displayed
Click 'X' button corresponding to particular product
Click locator('#cart_info').locator('tr').filter({ hasText: 'Pure Cotton Neon Green Tshirt' }).locator('.cart_quantity_delete')
Verify that product is removed from the cart
Expect "toBeHidden" locator('#cart_info').locator('tr').filter({ hasText: 'Pure Cotton Neon Green Tshirt' })
